metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: devenv
plugins.description: Initialize and manage Nix flake development environments with auto-detection and security tooling

plugins.name: commit-tools
plugins.description: End-to-end commit hygiene: write atomic commits with style enforcement, review and consolidate them before push, validate the final history

plugins.name: jot
plugins.description: Quick, low-friction capture of notes, tasks, ideas, session summaries, and tech radar blips with Obsidian-style auto-linking

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: The craft of building software end-to-end: capture ideas, understand problems, decompose work into structured units, dispatch subagents to execute them, and commit with full task context

plugins.name: sketch-note
plugins.description: Generate visual sketch notes in Excalidraw format from conversations, code architecture, or custom content

plugins.name: typst-notes
plugins.description: Generate beautiful PDF/HTML shareable notes using Typst with 7 professional templates, infographics, and modern typography

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Efficiency guardrails for Claude - IDE refactoring handoff with automatic pattern detection, extensible to security, cost, and testing patterns

plugins.name: codebase
plugins.description: Intelligent codebase exploration powered by codebase-memory-mcp. Natural language queries, change impact analysis, symbol graph traversal, and automatic brainstorming/planning integration.

plugins.name: study
plugins.description: Adaptive study coach with multi-gear learning sessions (Socratic, Explain, Guide, Check, Help) and spaced recall tracking via Feynman loops. Saves coaching notes with gap tracking and a recall log that shows improvement over time.

plugins.name: refactor
plugins.description: Semantic refactoring opportunity detection. Scans committed code for structural duplication (Fowler catalog), code smells (Fowler/Beck), GoF design pattern opportunities, SOLID/DRY principle violations, and language-idiomatic anti-patterns (Go, Python, TypeScript). Creates beads issues with TDD-first refactoring plans. Hooks into craft after each task closes.
